parameters.query: INSERT INTO email_log (candidate_id, job_opening_id, email_type, recipient_email, subject, body, status, error_message) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8) RETURNING *

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.candidate_id, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.job_opening_id, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.email_type, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.recipient_email, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.subject, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.body, ($json.status === 'sent' ? 'sent' : ($json.status === 'logged' ? 'logged' : 'failed')), ($json.error || $json.reason || null)] }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO email_log (candidate_id, job_opening_id, email_type, recipient_email, subject, body, status, error_message) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, 'failed', $7) RETURNING *

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.candidate_id, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.job_opening_id, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.email_type, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.recipient_email, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.subject, $('Send - Validate & Build Email').item.json.body, (($json.error && ($json.error.message || $json.error.description)) || 'SMTP bridge unreachable at http://127.0.0.1:8901/ — is scripts/smtp_server.py running?')] }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: ($json.status === 'sent'), status: ($json.status || 'failed'), message: ($json.status === 'sent' ? 'Email sent and logged' : ($json.status === 'logged' ? 'Logged — SMTP not configured (set SMTP_HOST etc. then restart start.sh)' : 'Send failed — ' + ($json.error_message || $json.error || 'see email_log'))), data: $json }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, data: $input.all().map(i => i.json).filter(i => i.id), count: $input.all().map(i => i.json).filter(i => i.id).length }) }}
